headline: AMN Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Gross Margin Contracts
summary: AMN Healthcare posts 367% adjusted EPS growth in Q1 as labor disruption demand and staffing gains drive revenues past estimates.

headline: MCK Stock Falls Despite Q4 Earnings Beat, Sales Miss, Margins Up
summary: McKesson beats Q4 EPS estimates as oncology and specialty distribution growth offset revenue miss and lift segment margins.

raw.headline: MCK Stock Falls Despite Q4 Earnings Beat, Sales Miss, Margins Up
raw.summary: McKesson beats Q4 EPS estimates as oncology and specialty distribution growth offset revenue miss and lift segment margins.

headline: INGN Stock Dips on Q1 Earnings Miss, Sales Up Y/Y, Gross Margin Improves
summary: Inogen posts higher Q1 revenues and improved gross margin as international portable oxygen demand offsets weaker U.S. sales.
